info.name: RAMP AI — demo-api
info.description:
Only RAMP image generation endpoints.

1. Start server: `cd demo-api && npm run dev`
2. Set `OPENAI_API_KEY` in `demo-api/.env`
3. Postman timeout: Settings → General → Request timeout → **0** or **300000** (generation takes 2–4 min)
4. Success response = PNG binary → use **Send and Download** to save file

request.description:
Prompt only → new image.

Optional fields:
- `model` (default: gpt-image-2)
- `size`: 1024x1024 | 1024x1536 | 1536x1024

formdata.value: Keep the subject but transform into a premium salon social media post with elegant branding

formdata.description: Your photo — PNG/JPEG/WebP, max 20MB. Field name must be `image`.

request.description:
Your image + prompt → AI generates new image using yours as reference.

Do NOT set Content-Type header manually.

Public image URL as reference.

Set collection variable `imageUrl` to a direct image link (e.g. Cloudinary URL).
Also accepts `url` instead of `imageUrl`.
